samples.xml_description:
<module id="fsm">
    <description>Mealy FSM detection circuit that detects the sequence '10011' in the input IN. Outputs MATCH=1 when the sequence is detected, and MATCH=0 otherwise. Supports continuous input and loops.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="IN">Input signal to be detected.</input>
        <input id="CLK">Clock signal for synchronization.</input>
        <input id="RST">Reset signal to initialize the FSM.</input>
        <output id="MATCH">Output signal indicating whether the sequence '10011' has been detected.</output>
    </ports>
    <implementation>
        // State encoding
        parameter IDLE = 3'b000;
        parameter S1 = 3'b001;
        parameter S2 = 3'b010;
        parameter S3 = 3'b011;
        parameter S4 = 3'b100;
        parameter S5 = 3'b101;
        
        // Internal signals
        reg [2:0] current_state, next_state;
        reg MATCH_reg;
        
        // Sequential logic for state transitions
        always @(posedge CLK or negedge RST) begin
            if (!RST) begin
                current_state <= IDLE;
                MATCH_reg <= 0;
            end else begin
                current_state <= next_state;
                MATCH_reg <= (current_state == S5 && IN == 1);
            end
        end
        
        // Combinational logic for next state determination
        always @(*) begin
            case (current_state)
                IDLE: begin
                    if (IN == 1) begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                S1: begin
                    if (IN == 0) begin
                        next_state = S2;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end
                end
                
                S2: begin
                    if (IN == 0) begin
                        next_state = S3;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = S1;
                    end
                end
                
                S3: begin
                    if (IN == 1) begin
                        next_state = S4;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                S4: begin
                    if (IN == 1) begin
                        next_state = S5;
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                S5: begin
                    if (IN == 1) begin
                        next_state = S1; // Loop back to S1
                    end else begin
                        next_state = IDLE;
                    end
                end
                
                default: next_state = IDLE;
            endcase
        end
        
        // Assigning output
        assign MATCH = MATCH_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
